flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 28% at Barry University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (2.2k vs 3.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Barry University fell 25% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9k → 2.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Barry University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Barry University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (54.6% → 63.4%).
